title: LoupeBench leaderboard entry
description: One row in the LoupeBench leaderboard. Anyone who runs `loupe bench --corpus <source>` produces one of these; the public leaderboard table is just a sorted concatenation.

corpus.description: Source identifier — e.g. `loupebench-v0.1` or the URL of the corpus.

corpus_size.description: Number of records in the corpus file at run time.

total.description: How many records were attempted (may be < corpus_size if `--limit` was used).

replayed.description: Records that replayed successfully (no SDK / network error). Capture is what we measure — judging output quality requires a separate LLM grader.

errors.description: Records that errored out during replay.

fail_rate.description: errors / total. Used by `--gate fail-rate=<percent>` in CI.

records.description: Per-record outcome — useful for inspecting which specific failures broke.

trace_id.description: New trace id if the replay succeeded.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the run was produced.
